overall.description: First-person exploration of an abandoned institutional facility, likely a hospital or office building, featuring dark corridors with red emergency lighting, scattered medical equipment, and debris. The footage appears to be from a high-quality horror video game with realistic lighting and atmospheric decay.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit abandoned office or control room with scattered desks, computers, and debris covering the concrete floor. Red light filters through windows on the right as the camera moves forward toward an open doorway leading deeper into the facility.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the doorway into a narrow institutional corridor bathed in red emergency lighting. Abandoned hospital beds line the left wall beneath graffiti tags, while debris litters the concrete floor. The corridor stretches ahead toward a distant exit sign.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a corridor junction where an illuminated EXIT sign hangs overhead. A reception desk lines the left wall while an open doorway on the right reveals another room. The character's hand becomes visible as they slow approaching the side entrance, with debris scattered across the concrete floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cluttered control room into a claustrophobic, red-lit institutional corridor that terminates at a junction. It begins by gliding past scattered desks and computers in a dimly lit office, moving toward an open doorway as red light filters in from the side. As the camera passes through the threshold, the environment shifts into a narrow hallway where abandoned hospital beds and graffiti line the walls under the glow of emergency lighting. The scene then progresses down the debris-strewn concrete path toward a distant exit sign, eventually slowing as the camera reaches a junction. Finally, the view pans toward a side entrance beside a reception desk, with a hand entering the frame as it approaches the open doorway.
